### Release Notes

<details>

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/compare/v7.1.0...v7.2.0)

#### What's Changed

-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.18.0 to 0.19.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/171](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/171)
-   build(deps): bump google.golang.org/protobuf from 1.32.0 to 1.34.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/170](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/170)
-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.19.0 to 0.20.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/172](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/172)
-   build(deps): bump google.golang.org/protobuf from 1.34.0 to 1.34.1 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/173](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/173)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/spf13/cobra from 1.8.0 to 1.8.1 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/178](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/178)
-   build(deps): bump google.golang.org/protobuf from 1.34.1 to 1.34.2 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/179](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/179)
-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.20.0 to 0.22.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/181](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/181)
-   go.mod: bump Go version to 1.20 by [@​rst0git](https://redirect.github.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/182](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/182)
-   test/make: drop golang version check by [@​rst0git](https://redirect.github.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/183](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/183)
-   chore(magicgen): migrate script to Python by [@​snprajwal](https://redirect.github.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/177](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/177)
-   criu swrk: return child error to caller by [@​Luap99](https://redirect.github.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/175](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/175)
-   ci: downgrade 'codecov-action' version to v3 by [@​rst0git](https://redirect.github.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/184](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/184)

-   feat(crit): add SearchPattern method on MemoryReader by [@​behouba](https://redirect.github.com/behouba) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/163](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/163)
-   ci(golangci-lint): disable gosec G115 by [@​snprajwal](https://redirect.github.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/188](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/188)
